---
title: "Research"
---

Here is a selection of works across several research themes. A comprehensive list can be found on my [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=rsVXjrMAAAAJ&hl=en) page. 

## AI in Surgery

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper}
Varghese C, Harrison EM, O'Grady G, Topol EJ.
[Artificial Intelligence in Surgery](https://rdcu.be/dHL7g).
*Nature Medicine*.
[![](assets/paper.svg){.pub-icon fig-alt="Paper link"}](https://rdcu.be/dHL7g)
:::

::: {.paper}
Varghese C, Habermann EB, Hanson K, Choudhary A, Salehinejad H, Thiels C.
[Tabular foundation models as a new portable standard in local surgical risk prediction](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41666517/).
*Surgery*.
:::

::: {.paper}
Varghese C, Choudhary A, Starlinger P, Kendrick M, Smoot R, Warner SG, Truty M, Habermann EB, Salehinejad H, Thiels CA.
[Dynamic prediction of early discharge after major pancreatic surgery](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41667369/).
*Surgery*.
:::

::: {.paper}
Varghese C, Peters L, Gaborit L et al., on behalf of the TASMAN Collaborative. 
[Predicting opioid consumption after surgical discharge: a multinational derivation and validation study using a foundation model](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41746-025-01798-6).
*npj Digital Medicine*.
[![](assets/paper.svg){.pub-icon fig-alt="Paper link"}](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41746-025-01798-6.pdf)
[![](assets/github.svg){.pub-icon fig-alt="GitHub repository"}](https://github.com/kriz98/operas)
:::

:::

## Surgical Recovery

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper}
McLean KA, Knight SR, Diehl TM, Varghese C, Ng N, Potter MA, Zafar SN, Bouamrane MM, Harrison EM.
[Readiness for implementation of novel digital health interventions for postoperative monitoring](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37100544/).
*Lancet Digital Health*.
[![](assets/paper.svg){.pub-icon fig-alt="Paper link"}](https://www.thelancet.com/action/showPdf?pii=S2589-7500%2823%2900026-2)
:::

::: {.paper}
Dawes AJ, Lin AY, Varghese C, Russel MM, Lin AY.
["Mobile health technology for remote home monitoring after surgery: a meta-analysis](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34661649/).
*BJS*.
[![](assets/paper.svg){.pub-icon fig-alt="Paper link"}](https://academic.oup.com/bjs/article-pdf/108/11/1304/50744518/znab323.pdf)

:::

::: {.paper}
Wells C, Varghese C, Boyle L, McGuinness MJ, Keane C, O'Grady G, Gurney J, Koea J, Harmston C, Bissett IP.
["Failure to Rescue" following colorectal cancer resection](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=Failure+to+Rescue+following+Colorectal+Cancer+Resection+Variation+and+Improvements+in+a+National+Study).
*Annals of Surgery*.
:::

:::

## Translational GI Physiology 

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper}
Varghese C, Schamberg G, Calder S, Waite S, Carson D, Foong D, Wang W, Ho V, Woodhead J, Daker C, Xu W, Du P, Abell T, Parkman HP, Tack J, Andrews CA, O'Grady G, Gharibans G.
[Normative values for body surface gastric mapping evaluations of gastric motility using Gastric Alimetry](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/36534985/).
*American Journal of Gastroenterology*.
:::

::: {.paper}
Varghese C, Pasricha PJ, Abell T, Parkman HP, Andrews CN, Kesthelyi D, Gharibans AA, Farrugia G, O'Grady G.
[Spectrum of interstitial cell of Cajal deficits in chronic gastroduodenal disorders](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40658171/).
*American Journal of Gastroenterology*.
:::

::: {.paper}
Gharibans AA, Calder S, Varghese C, Waite S, Schamberg G, Daker C, Du P, Alighaleh S, Carson D, Woodhead J, Farrugia G, Windsor JA, Andrews CN, O'Grady G.
[Gastric dysfunction in patients with chronic nausea and vomiting syndromes defined by a noninvasive gastric mapping device](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/36130019/).
*Science Translational Medicine*.
[![](assets/paper.svg){.pub-icon fig-alt="Paper link"}](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10042458/)
:::
:::

## Student and Trainee-Led Collaboratives

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper}
TASMAN Collaborative.
[Predicting opioid consumption after surgical discharge](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38721718/).
*Anaesthesia*.
[![](assets/paper.svg){.pub-icon fig-alt="Paper link"}](https://associationofanaesthetists-publications.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/anae.16297)
:::

::: {.paper}
STRATA Collaborative.
[Variation in the practice of cholecystectomy for benign biliary disease in Aotearoa New Zealand](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37198069/).
*HPB*.
[![](assets/paper.svg){.pub-icon fig-alt="Paper link"}](https://www.hpbonline.org/action/showPdf?pii=S1365-182X%2823%2900128-4)

:::

::: {.paper}
EuroSurg and STARSurg Collaborative.
[Global Use and Outcomes of Endoscopic Stenting in Acute Malignant Left-Sided Colonic Obstruction: A Secondary Analysis of APOLLO, An International, Prospective Cohort Study](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41070782/).
*Diseases of the Colon and Rectum*.
:::
:::
